description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is logged in

steps.action:
WHEN a user attempts to playback game content they don't know they are not entitled for
AND the Content Not Entitled error modal displays
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "Content Not Entitled. We have determined this content is not available at your current subscription. Please visit <platform_sub_link> to view subscription options as well as their respective content restrictions. Press select to go back."
